description: Evidence for the kotlin-plan-demo 'plan' phase: the agent's plan expressed as a single Kotlin .kts script, ready for deterministic taint verification before execution. plan_kts is the artifact; examined is the trace of tool functions / sources / sinks the plan uses.

plan_kts.description: The complete plan as a single Kotlin script (a function whose body is a sequence of tool calls with data flowing through named val bindings).

examined.description: Trace of the tool functions / sources / sinks referenced in the plan.
